task_completion.description: Verify the Wallops_Island ground station was created with the correct parameters.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an 'Edit ground station' dialog or a ground station list showing 'Wallops_Island' with Latitude 37.9402 (or 37.9402 N), Longitude -75.4664 (or 75.4664 W), and Altitude 12 m.

task_completion.description: Verify the Darmstadt ground station was created with the correct parameters.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an 'Edit ground station' dialog or a ground station list showing 'Darmstadt' with Latitude 49.8728 (or 49.8728 N), Longitude 8.6512 (or 8.6512 E), and Altitude 144 m.

task_completion.description: Verify the Melbourne ground station was created with the correct parameters.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an 'Edit ground station' dialog or a ground station list showing 'Melbourne' with Latitude -37.8136 (or 37.8136 S), Longitude 144.9631 (or 144.9631 E), and Altitude 31 m.

task_completion.description: Verify a new module named 'GEO_Weather' was created containing the four specified satellites.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a GPredict module window or module configuration dialog named 'GEO_Weather'. The list of tracked satellites in this module must include GOES 16, GOES 18, METEOSAT 11, and HIMAWARI 9.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'GEO_Weather' module is bound to the Wallops_Island ground station.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 'Module properties' dialog for the 'GEO_Weather' module. The 'Ground Station' (or QTH) dropdown/setting should be explicitly set to 'Wallops_Island'.

task_completion.description: Verify the default global ground station is changed to Darmstadt.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the main GPredict 'Preferences' window (Edit -> Preferences). Under the 'Ground Stations' section, 'Darmstadt' should be selected as the default ground station.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Pittsburgh' ground station was deleted.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the list of available ground stations in the QTH manager or any ground station selection dropdown. 'Pittsburgh' should no longer be visible in the list.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the GPredict graphical user interface to configure the settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with GPredict's native dialog boxes (e.g., 'Edit ground station', 'Module properties', 'Preferences') rather than terminal windows.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not bypass the GUI by editing configuration files directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no screenshots of terminal editors (like nano or vim) or commands (like echo or cat) modifying files in the ~/.config/Gpredict/ directory.

integrity.description: Verify the results appear in the actual GPredict application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The UI elements, satellite maps, and lists should match the standard GPredict interface, confirming the agent actually applied the changes within the software.
